{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032202524525822BE967A27568281B\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611845102072841022","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"同样的三个大美女，总是催更，这本更的怎么没有主神系统绑定我勤了，坐等新章快呀😁😁😁"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772273089,"group_id":"7605823350409022526","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyiEngp51JDnY5PSz8yjwgLY3WPhxFqu6DqcI11VBlLo","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/48ea735a8d484ccab22928ae20bd69ae~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776707045\u0026x-signature=LEr1X2%2BI2e7s4NZmvmfh1H8O9dk%3D","user_id":"3808317640024206","user_name":"池渊恋林"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3808317640024206","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7605823350409022526","book_info":{"abstract":"温柔体贴乖乖女顾槿安第一次去上京市就遇到了三个京圈大小姐，叛逆小公主给她黑卡她不要，理想白月光请她吃饭她不去，就连上京市排行第一的集团公司继承人让她开条件她也说不用。\n不小心一句话引起了三个女人的兴趣，自从之后她的生活也发生了翻天覆地的变化。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/2a378f31346ad7bf30ebff01009da9f4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"只配读书","author_id":"","book_id":"7605823350409022526","book_name":"她被三个大小姐富追不舍","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8d8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":704,\"name\":\"双女主\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704\u0026name=双女主\u0026genre_type=0\u0026ge
